message:
test(core): add property-based tests for memory pool invariants (ft-2p9cb.3.1.3)

10 proptests: conservation invariant, total bounded, utilization bounded,
alloc-free roundtrip, shrink bounded, reset restores initial,
serde roundtrips for MemoryDomain/AllocResult/PoolDegradation,
stage_to_domain coverage. 132 proptests total.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
